name: sketchup
description: Sketchup integration through Model Context Protocol

tools.name: create_component
tools.description: Create a grouped primitive in the active SketchUp model.

type.description: Primitive type: cube, cylinder, sphere, or cone.

position.description: Origin as [x, y, z] in model units.

dimensions.description: Width, depth, and height in model units.

tools.name: delete_component
tools.description: Delete one entity from the active SketchUp model.

tools.name: transform_component
tools.description: Move, rotate, or scale an entity in the active SketchUp model.

position.description: Translation as [x, y, z] in model units.

rotation.description: Rotation about x, y, and z in degrees.

scale.description: Scale factors along x, y, and z.

tools.name: get_selection
tools.description: List the entities currently selected in SketchUp.

tools.name: set_material
tools.description: Apply a named material or hexadecimal color to an entity.

id.description: SketchUp entity ID to receive the material.

material.description: Existing material name, common color name, or #RRGGBB color.

tools.name: export_scene
tools.description: Export the active model to a temporary file.

format.description: Export format: skp, obj, dae, stl, png, jpg, or jpeg.

tools.name: boolean_operation
tools.description: Create the union, difference, or intersection of two grouped entities.

target_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the target solid.

tool_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the tool solid.

delete_originals.description: Delete both source entities after a successful operation.

tools.name: create_mortise_tenon
tools.description: Create a mortise and matching tenon between two boards.

mortise_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving the mortise.

tenon_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving the tenon.

tools.name: create_dovetail
tools.description: Create matching dovetail tails and pins between two boards.

tail_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the tail board.

pin_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the pin board.

angle.description: Dovetail angle in degrees, greater than 0 and less than 90.

num_tails.description: Number of tails and matching pins.

tools.name: create_finger_joint
tools.description: Create matching fingers and slots between two boards.

board1_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving fingers.

board2_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving slots.

num_fingers.description: Number of fingers and matching slots.

tools.name: eval_ruby
tools.description: Evaluate Ruby source in SketchUp's top-level binding.

code.description: Ruby source code to evaluate. Snippets must not manage SketchUp operations.
